definitions: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei is the second and current Supreme Leader of Iran, in office since 1989.
He previously served as the third President of Iran from 1981 to 1989.
examples: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been the Supreme Leader of Iran since 1989.
Khamenei succeeded Ruhollah Khomeini as Supreme Leader.
The statements were attributed to Khamenei.
